The closest approximation of the
effect of the new rates can give is
to state tersely, first:


THAT Spokane formerly did not
enjoy commodity rates that wer euios.
cd by Seattle and Tacoma. She did

Were satisfactory to her jobbers. She

with reference to distributing rates

tance. She has been getting a terri
